ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Dog Food, Cat Food) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., Dry Dog Food, Wet Dog Food) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sub-category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the sub-category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the sub-category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the sales data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sales data was recorded */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the sub-category in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was last updated */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the sales amount is estimated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate record */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the growth rate belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the growth rate was calculated */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the sub-category in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the growth rate was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the growth rate was last updated */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the growth rate is estimated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_sales" (
  "total_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total sales record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the total sales belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the total sales was calculated */,
  "total_sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product category in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the total sales data was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the total sales data was last updated */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the total sales amount is estimated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_sales_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales analyst, marketing team, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report is a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the forecast belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the forecast was made */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales amount for the sub-category in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
